content: Music is troublesome. It seems that no sooner have you created it, than it in some strange way fades its original spark that was glorified by your mind.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Sumyjkl (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:La musica è problematica. Sembra che non appena tu l'hai creata, in qualche strano modo sfumi la scintilla originale, ch
